title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding and trusted by brands like The New York Times and Wiz, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale its GTM operational backbone. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS fintech expertise aligns perfectly with Finout's domain, proven GTM scaling experience, strong Salesforce/RevOps background, and Tel Aviv hybrid role matches preferred locations.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed your deep expertise in scaling GTM operations across fintech and AI-native SaaS aligns remarkably well with what Finout is building. With your track record of architecting revenue operations backbone for high-growth companies, you'd be uniquely positioned to help Finout scale its operational efficiency across Sales, Marketing, and Finance—especially given the complexity of cloud cost management and their ambitious growth trajectory.

title: Head of RevOps
description: Candid Health is hiring an experienced, results-driven Head of RevOps to build and lead its Sales Operations function. This pivotal role shapes how GTM teams execute—from compensation design to forecasting, reporting, systems, and strategic planning. The role blends hands-on operation and strategic leadership, partnering with Sales, Marketing, Product, Finance, and Legal to drive scalable growth. Responsibilities include quota management, commissions, forecasting, quarterly/annual planning, building annual operating plans, board and executive reporting, and driving change management across GTM functions.
score_reason: Exceptional alignment with Omri's 15+ years of B2B SaaS RevOps expertise and demonstrated strengths in quota management, forecasting, compensation design, and GTM strategy. Remote US role eliminates location friction while the scope directly matches his core competencies in scaling revenue operations.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I came across Candid Health's Head of RevOps opening and immediately recognized the opportunity to build something significant. With 15+ years scaling RevOps functions in B2B SaaS—including deep experience in quota design, commission architecture, pipeline forecasting, and cross-functional GTM alignment—I've built the exact infrastructure you're describing. I'm particularly interested in how Candid Health is structuring its GTM operations in healthcare tech, and I'd love to explore how I can help drive that scalable growth.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a leader in revenue intelligence, seeks a RevOps Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations. The role partners with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions, conduct quantitative and qualitative analyses, and redesign territory models for global scalability. Requirements include deep understanding of B2B SaaS GTM models, sales territories, and segmentation; strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool); and Salesforce proficiency. Experience with territory management tools like Fullcast, Pigment, or Anaplan is a plus.
score_reason: Exceptional match—Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise, Salesforce proficiency, and GTM strategy background align perfectly with Gong's territory optimization focus. The role's emphasis on pipeline forecasting, analytical rigor, and revenue operations directly leverages his core strengths.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations infrastructure in B2B SaaS, and Gong's focus on territory strategy and quantitative GTM modeling is exactly the kind of high-leverage work I'm drawn to. Your need for someone who can bridge Sales, Finance, and Strategy around territory composition resonates deeply with how I've scaled operations at growth-stage companies.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl, a YC-backed, cash-flow-positive grant-management SaaS with 5,000+ nonprofit clients, seeks a RevOps Manager to own the technical infrastructure powering its revenue engine. This builder role involves architecting the CRM data model, integrating new data sources, and leading AI tool implementation across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops/Marketing Ops or GTM Systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong technical skills (SQL, workflows, APIs), hands-on CRM administration (HubSpot preferred), and data architecture/integration experience. Familiarity with enrichment and intent data vendors is a plus.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: RevOps Manager role aligns perfectly with Omri's seniority and expertise; YC-backed B2B SaaS company matches ideal profile; technical requirements (HubSpot, data architecture, API/SQL skills, AI implementation) are core strengths; remote location is approved.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I came across Instrumentl's RevOps Manager opening and was impressed by your focus on architecting data infrastructure and AI-native GTM—two areas where I've built playbooks at scale in B2B SaaS. With 15+ years in Revenue Operations and hands-on experience designing CRM ecosystems in HubSpot, integrating enrichment/intent data vendors, and leading AI tool rollouts, I'm confident I can accelerate your revenue engine from day one. Would love to explore how I can help Instrumentl scale beyond 5,000 clients.

title: Senior Manager, Revenue Operations
description: Eve, a legal-tech leader empowering plaintiff attorneys with AI-driven solutions, seeks a Senior Manager of Revenue Operations to lead a team and own measurable revenue outcomes. Requires 8-10+ years in Revenue/Sales/GTM Operations at high-growth B2B SaaS with 3-5 years of people leadership. The role focuses on diagnosing and plugging revenue leaks—stalled pipeline, low conversion, slow follow-up, broken handoffs—building a high-performing team, and operating cross-functionally with Sales, CS, Marketing, Finance, and Enablement. AI-native operating posture and hypergrowth experience strongly valued.
score_reason: Perfect alignment: 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps experience exceeds 8-10+ requirement, legal-tech/AI-native GTM matches strong fit profile, senior leadership scope matches target roles. Only minor gap: people leadership experience not explicitly mentioned in candidate profile.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I've spent 15 years building revenue machines in high-growth B2B SaaS—diagnosing pipeline leaks, fixing broken handoffs between Sales/CS/Marketing, and scaling teams through hypergrowth cycles. Eve's focus on AI-native GTM and using automation to solve plaintiff attorney workflows resonates with how I've scaled legal-tech and fintech ops—I'd love to explore how we can plug revenue leaks and build a tier-1 RevOps function that compounds your growth.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo, an AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, high-quality consumer/B2B research used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange, seeks a GTM Engineer. As Conveo scales rapidly, the role involves coding, shipping, and iterating on internal tools and automations to make the GTM team highly effective. You'll replace manual workflows and spreadsheets with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows—including lead scoring models, attribution pipelines, faster onboarding flows, and AI agents that eliminate hours of manual work weekly.
score_reason: Strong alignment with GTM Engineer title, automation/workflow optimization expertise, and AI-native approach. Slight concern: role emphasizes coding/shipping (IC technical skills) whereas Omri's strength is strategic RevOps leadership at scale.
ai_opener: Conveo's approach to automating GTM workflows with AI agents resonates deeply—I've spent 15+ years eliminating spreadsheet hell and manual processes in B2B SaaS, most recently by building attribution pipelines and lead scoring models that freed teams from repetitive work. Your vision of replacing manual workflows with purpose-built automation aligns perfectly with how I think about modern RevOps, and I'd be interested in exploring how to accelerate Conveo's GTM efficiency as you scale.

title: RevOps GTM Engineer
description: Roboflow is hiring a GTM Engineer to support and extend its go-to-market systems, reporting to the Head of RevOps and working with business operations stakeholders, sales, and cross-functional collaborators. This hands-on, execution-focused role involves implementing, customizing, and scaling Salesforce and the broader GTM tech stack (Outreach, ZoomInfo, Clay) while building custom tooling and AI-powered workflows where off-the-shelf solutions fall short. Responsibilities include building Salesforce functionality (Apex, LWC, Flows, custom objects) and implementing GTM workflows, automation, and data models.
score_reason: Strong alignment on RevOps, GTM stack, and Salesforce expertise, but this is a hands-on engineering/IC role requiring Apex/LWC development skills that may be below Omri's seniority level as a senior executive. Better suited for a GTM Engineer hire than a Head of RevOps reporting structure.
ai_opener: Roboflow's approach to AI-native GTM systems caught my attention—especially the focus on custom Apex/LWC workflows and intelligent automation. With 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS RevOps stacks and deep Salesforce customization experience, I've built similar AI-powered tooling to replace off-the-shelf gaps. Happy to discuss how to architect your GTM tech foundation for scale.

title: Head of Sales and Marketing (B2B SaaS)
description: saas.group seeks a Head of Sales & Marketing to lead all commercial activities across one of its brands, owning the full growth engine from top-of-funnel acquisition through conversion, retention, and revenue expansion. Requires 7-10+ years of B2B SaaS commercial experience across both Sales and Marketing, a proven track record scaling revenue engines in SMB/mid-market SaaS, deep understanding of SaaS metrics (ARR/MRR, CAC, LTV, NDR), and command of modern marketing channels and sales motions. The role works closely with the CEO to sharpen positioning and accelerate pipeline.
score_reason: Strong alignment on B2B SaaS, SaaS metrics expertise (CAC/LTV/ARR), and 15+ years exceeds the 7-10 requirement. Slight gap: role emphasizes balanced Sales & Marketing leadership rather than pure RevOps/GTM engineering focus, and no mention of AI-native GTM or fintech vertical.
ai_opener: Hi [Name] – I've been tracking saas.group's approach to scaling B2B SaaS brands, and your Head of Sales & Marketing brief caught my attention. With 15+ years building revenue engines across mid-market SaaS, I've spent the last several years optimizing the full commercial funnel—from demand gen and sales motion through LTV expansion—and I'm particularly drawn to roles where RevOps rigor meets go-to-market strategy. I'd be interested in exploring how we could accelerate pipeline and positioning together.

title: Lead Marketing & Growth Operations Analyst
description: Tebra seeks a Lead Marketing & Growth Operations Analyst with 5-7+ years in Marketing Analytics, Growth Analytics, Revenue Operations, or GTM Analytics within SaaS or high-growth environments. The role requires a deep understanding of marketing funnels, lifecycle stages, attribution models, and campaign performance, connecting upstream engagement to downstream revenue. Strong SQL skills and experience with modern data stacks (Snowflake, dbt, BI tools) are needed. The ideal candidate moves from analysis to recommendation, influences without formal authority, and partners with Marketing, Growth, and Sales stakeholders in fast-moving environments.
score_reason: Strong alignment on RevOps/GTM expertise, SaaS background, and stakeholder influence skills. Gap: role emphasizes technical data stack (SQL, Snowflake, dbt) where Omri's strength is operations strategy and process design rather than hands-on analytics engineering.
ai_opener: Omri here—15 years building GTM engines in B2B SaaS. Tebra's focus on connecting marketing engagement to revenue outcomes resonates with how I've structured RevOps orgs. I've led the strategy side of attribution and pipeline analytics; curious if you're looking for someone who can bridge analytics insights with operational execution, or if the SQL/dbt depth is mission-critical for this role.

title: Sales and Marketing Operations Manager
description: Together AI, a research-driven artificial intelligence company, seeks a highly analytical Sales and Marketing Operations Manager for its Revenue Strategy and Operations team. The role bridges marketing strategy, sales execution, and data-driven decision-making, optimizing the full lead-to-revenue funnel. Requires 5-7 years in Sales/Marketing Operations or Business Intelligence (preferably B2B SaaS), expert-level experience with marketing automation platforms (HubSpot, Marketo, Pardot) and Salesforce, data visualization skills (Tableau, Power BI, Looker), and advanced Excel with SQL/Python a plus. Responsibilities include full-funnel reporting, performance analysis, and attribution modeling.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS background, and technical skills (HubSpot, Salesforce, data visualization). The AI-native company and full-funnel optimization focus match his GTM strengths, though the title is slightly more marketing-ops focused than his target Head of Revenue Operations roles.
ai_opener: Hi Omri, Together AI is building cutting-edge AI infrastructure, and your 15+ years optimizing B2B SaaS revenue engines would directly impact how we scale our lead-to-revenue machine. Your expertise in pipeline forecasting and CAC/LTV modeling aligns perfectly with the analytical rigor we need to drive our GTM strategy—especially as we scale an AI-native go-to-market motion.

title: Sales Operations Manager (SMB Sales)
description: Apollo.io, the leading go-to-market solution for revenue teams trusted by over 500,000 companies and valued at $1.6 billion, seeks a Sales Operations Manager supporting SMB Sales. As one of the fastest-growing SaaS companies, Apollo provides verified contact data for 210M+ B2B contacts and tools to engage and convert prospects. This role supports the SMB sales organization with operational execution, process optimization, and data-driven insights to drive efficiency and revenue growth. Backed by top-tier investors including Sequoia Capital and Bain Capital Ventures.
score_reason: Strong match for RevOps expertise and B2B SaaS experience with a category-leading platform, though the SMB-specific focus and Sales Ops (vs. broader RevOps) scope is slightly narrower than ideal for a senior executive. Remote US location is acceptable.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager] – I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations engines at B2B SaaS companies, and Apollo.io's data infrastructure and GTM mission genuinely resonates. With deep experience in Salesforce/HubSpot optimization, pipeline forecasting, and driving operational leverage across sales orgs, I'm curious how you're scaling SMB sales efficiency at Apollo's growth stage.

title: Revenue Operations Enablement Manager
description: Justt, an Israel-based B2B SaaS company revolutionizing chargeback management with an AI-powered, machine-learning platform, seeks a Revenue Operations Enablement Manager. The platform dynamically generates tailored evidence for each dispute, leveraging 500+ data points from PSPs, third-party, and merchant data, scaling effortlessly with high-quality responses. This role focuses on revenue operations and sales enablement, supporting the GTM team with processes, tooling, and training to drive win rates and operational efficiency in a fast-growing fintech SaaS environment based in Tel Aviv.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Senior RevOps executive meets all core criteria (B2B SaaS, Fintech, AI-native GTM, sales enablement focus). Tel Aviv location aligns perfectly with candidate's geographic preferences.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Justt's AI-powered chargeback platform and immediately thought of you—their focus on scaling GTM operations through process optimization and sales enablement directly mirrors your 15+ years building RevOps at scale in B2B SaaS and fintech. With your track record in Salesforce/HubSpot and pipeline forecasting, you'd be uniquely positioned to architect the revenue operations infrastructure that helps their GTM team maximize win rates across their 500+ data-point disputes. The Revenue Operations Enablement Manager role seems built for someone who can bridge operations and enablement—exactly your wheelhouse.
